concept: A microscopic cross-section of an artificial tear duct leaking fiber-optic cables and dead pixels into a metallic eye socket.
A vast, decaying server-farm necropolis where massive cooling towers exhale toxic amber mist into a glitching, desolate landscape.
A shattered anatomical heart reconstructed using tangled network cables, hovering over a clinical steel examination tray.
A pure waveform visualization of a dying human consciousness depicted as jagged, decaying audio peaks.
